name: fear_greed
description: Crypto Fear & Greed Index PRO — The definitive FGI source. Real-time 0-100 + 1Y percentile (where vs last 365d) + momentum + cycle phase + DCA signals + 'last time at this level' context + BTC correlation. Thresholds: <20 STRONG_BUY (capitulation), <35 BUY (accumulation), 45-55 HOLD, >70 REDUCE, >80 STRONG_REDUCE (euphoria). For: DCA bots, swing traders, rebalancers, risk managers, options. JSON, sub-second. Keywords: FGI, sentiment, contrarian, capitulation, FOMO.

lookback.description: Optional lookback window in days. Valid values: 7, 30, 365. Default 7.

signal.description: Actionable verdict: <20 STRONG_BUY, 20-40 BUY, 40-60 NEUTRAL, 60-80 REDUCE, >80 STRONG_REDUCE

momentum7d.description: Change vs 7d ago, in raw FGI points

percentile1y.description: Where the current value sits vs the last 365d
